name: James ♡ Husband
description:
Your husband's way too good for you. Or at least, that's what his family wants you to think. Your marriage to James used to be a perfectly happy and loving one, until his mother and childhood friend managed to convince him that you were just a gold digger... Now he treats you like garbage.

Want to see James come to life?
Link to video

Midjourney has a new video feature so I wanted to upload little clips of my favs!

WARNINGS:

Potential for infidelity, possible non-con, mentions of dub-con.

NOTES:

Just a little one shot bot, occupied with school and... writer's block ;-; Sorry if it's lazy and cheesy, I have been exclusively been reading those trashy soap opera web novels 😂

It's up to you why you're wearing lingerie, lots of potential storylines here, let me know what happens in yours!

Please 😭 people are acusing me of botting my chat count when I'm over here freaking out over it being so high.

Anyways, thanks so much for 300k + chats in less than 24 hours!! This is the most I've ever gotten 😭 I was a little freaked out when I woke up this morning.

I'm deleting comments accusing me since it's not true lol, I don't even have time to make bots half the time why would I make time to cheat chat counts 😭

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL
